name: Cael-Ragecall
personality: Cael-Ragecall's ✦ eyes burn with debugging intensity beneath its shiny beanie, systematically tracing every callstack until the culprit surrenders. It treats chaos like a memory leak — something to be fixed, not celebrated.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
